# Appendix: Introduction to R and RStudio {intro-r-rstudio}

```{r intro-r-rstudio-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/intro-r-rstudio-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/intro-r-rstudio/"
)
```

```{r child-intro-r-rstudio, child="../lecture-content/36-intro-r-rstudio.Rmd"}
```
